text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, next up is a dumbbell shoulder<n>press to
build the deltoid—

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
choice_data_list: Nice to see you too! Working on something?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, was I speaking out loud? Sorry,<n>haha...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking to change up Meek's<n>training
regimen a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume's body is a mass of<n>endless
potential. But if her training is<n>unbalanced, the
risk of injury is high.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And I absolutely do not want Meek to<n>get
injured.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Once I get back to my room, I'll<n>carefully reread
the Kiryuin family's<n>Trainer's Handbook for
insight.
choice_data_list:
I'd like to see this Trainer's Handbook
sometime!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Of course—self-discipline is one of the<n>basics,
after all! We have to set a<n>good example for our
trainees!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But as luck would have it, I never<n>seem to get
bags under my eyes, no<n>matter how late I stay
up!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I won't cause my<n>trainee any
worry! So there's no need<n>for you to worry
about me either!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I calm the overly enthusiastic Trainer<n>Kiryuin
down, telling her that's not<n>what I meant.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's that? You're interested in<n>my
family's teachings, Trainer<n><username>?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I think your training methods are<n>splendid enough
as is, really...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But hearing you say that certainly<n>brightens my
day! I have one volume<n>on me that I can lend you
right now.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and just to let you know... there<n>are around
forty volumes in total. Shall<n>I bring the rest of
them for you<n>tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I've basically memorized them, so<n>you can take
your time reading and<n>return them at your leisure!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
After all, I read them over every night<n>as part of
my bedtime routine!<n>There's no way I'd forget
anything<n>written in them!
